features: It has removable brush head, comfortable grip, 304 stainless steel handle, sturdy bristles.

description: Product Description Top-spring Toilet Brush This toilet brush is an ideal cleaning tool for cleaning toilets or bathrooms. Helps to inhibit bacteria growth, truly senses bacteria, mould and properly cleans the odour generated in the toilet to prevent the spread of bacteria. Designed with ergonomic non-slip handle is comfortable to grip, unique grooved base keeps toilet brush and holder stable. The flat and classy looking toilet brush and holder will match any bathroom style. Make Cleaning Easier Stains Are Easy to Remove Comprehensive Cleanliness, Cleanliness and Hygiene The Dirt is Washed Away Durable Brush Head The bristles are strong and stiff enough for deep cleaning, flexible to clean the edge and also can protect the surface of the toilet. Perfect for Your Bathroom This toilet brush comes in a compact size, so there is a perfect brush for every bathroom. With our toilet brush your bathroom will look beautiful and tidy, it makes cleaning a pleasure. Sturdy&Stainless Steel Our toilet brush has a removable brush head, comfortable handle, 304 stainless steel handle and sturdy bristles.
